summary: Excellent restored soundboard captures a thrilling show that surprises with an unexpected Johnny B. Goode at the very end.
review: The restoration work on this pre‑FM GEMS tape is praised as beautiful and crystal‑clear, preserving every tuning note, DJ comment, and audience reaction. Fans are clearly delighted by the performance, especially the surprise pull‑out of Johnny B. Goode as a finale, making it a memorable listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review is available, but it gives a perfect five‑star rating and highlights both superb audio restoration and an exciting performance, justifying a high overall score despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Restoration praised as beautiful; tuning notes, DJ comments, and audience demand are clearly audible, indicating a clean, crisp mix with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The show builds to an unexpected encore with Johnny B. Goode, adding excitement and a memorable close.
